'''Bosk-toth''' was a minor [[Quara/Legends|Quara]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]]. He worked from a base in [[Quantill City]], on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ando/Legends|Ando]]. Bosk-Toth illegally captured [[Andoan mineral-fish]], selling the extracted [[Sedrellium/Legends|sedrellium]] on the [[Black market/Legends|black market]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Ando" />
